'''dhangobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:crabapple|crabapple]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-ng-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:crabapple|crabapple]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhangobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhængebeth|dhængebeth]] || [[word:dhængebej|dhængebej]] || [[word:dhængebesh|dhængebesh]] || [[word:dhængebe|dhængebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhangongoboth|dhangongoboth]] || [[word:dhangongoboj|dhangongoboj]] || [[word:dhangongobosh|dhangongobosh]] || [[word:dhangongobo|dhangongobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhangoboth|dhangoboth]] || [[word:dhangoboj|dhangoboj]] || [[word:dhangobosh|dhangobosh]] || [[word:dhangobo|dhangobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhangofboth|dhangofboth]] || [[word:dhangofboj|dhangofboj]] || [[word:dhangofbosh|dhangofbosh]] || [[word:dhangofbof|dhangofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhangobotho|dhangobotho]] || [[word:dhangobojo|dhangobojo]] || [[word:dhangobosho|dhangobosho]] || [[word:dhangoboko|dhangoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhangoboth|dhangoboth]] || [[word:dhangoboj|dhangoboj]] || [[word:dhangobosh|dhangobosh]] || [[word:dhangobo|dhangobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhangobothol|dhangobothol]] || [[word:dhangobojol|dhangobojol]] || [[word:dhangoboshol|dhangoboshol]] || [[word:dhangobokol|dhangobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhangobothotho|dhangobothotho]] || [[word:dhangobojojo|dhangobojojo]] || [[word:dhangoboshosho|dhangoboshosho]] || [[word:dhangoboko|dhangoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhangobothon|dhangobothon]] || [[word:dhangobojon|dhangobojon]] || [[word:dhangoboshon|dhangoboshon]] || [[word:dhangobokon|dhangobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhangobothoro|dhangobothoro]] || [[word:dhangobojoro|dhangobojoro]] || [[word:dhangoboshoro|dhangoboshoro]] || [[word:dhangobokoro|dhangobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
